title: Stachytarpheta puberula
taxonomy: Stachytarpheta puberula is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Stachytarpheta, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the false vervains. The Verbenaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Stachytarpheta puberula is a perennial herb that is native to South America. The classification of Stachytarpheta puberula is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Lamiales, Family: Verbenaceae, Genus: Stachytarpheta, Species: S. puberula.
